name: agnotita
description: agnotita — for the unrecognized. Auto-generate premium websites for offline businesses.

scripts.pipeline: echo 'Usage: npm run scrape -- "Name" -c type && npm run generate -- scraper/output/slug.json -t type && npm run deploy -- generator/output/slug/out -s slug'
